allow: Bash(sed -i '' 's|document.querySelectorAll\(\\x27.fade-in\\x27\).forEach\(el => observer.observe\(el\)\);|document.querySelectorAll\("".fade-in""\).forEach\(el => observer.observe\(el\)\);    document.querySelectorAll\(""#mobile-menu a""\).forEach\(link => {      link.addEventListener\(""click"", \(\) => {        menu.classList.add\(""hidden""\);        open = false;        bar1.style.transform = """";        bar2.style.opacity = """";        bar3.style.transform = """";      }\);    }\);|g' "$file")
